name: TeamClaw
description: Virtual team collaboration - multiple OpenClaw instances form a virtual software company with role-based task routing.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: controller manages the team, worker executes tasks

port.label: Port
port.help: HTTP server port for this instance

controllerUrl.label: Controller URL
controllerUrl.help: Manual fallback if mDNS discovery fails

taskTimeoutMs.label: Task Timeout
taskTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a role task to finish before marking it failed (in milliseconds)

gitEnabled.label: Git Collaboration
gitEnabled.help: Enable automatic git-backed workspace bootstrapping and worker repo sync

gitRemoteUrl.label: Git Remote URL
gitRemoteUrl.help: Optional remote repository URL; when empty, distributed workers use controller-hosted git bundles

gitDefaultBranch.label: Git Default Branch
gitDefaultBranch.help: Default branch name for the TeamClaw workspace repository

gitAuthorName.label: Git Author Name
gitAuthorName.help: Author name for TeamClaw-managed workspace commits

gitAuthorEmail.label: Git Author Email
gitAuthorEmail.help: Author email for TeamClaw-managed workspace commits

localRoles.label: Local Roles
localRoles.help: Controller mode only: run these roles as local virtual workers inside the same OpenClaw instance

workerProvisioningType.label: On-demand Worker Provider
workerProvisioningType.help: Launch missing workers on demand using process, Docker, or Kubernetes

workerProvisioningControllerUrl.label: Provisioned Worker Controller URL
workerProvisioningControllerUrl.help: URL that launched workers use to call back into the controller

workerProvisioningRoles.label: Provisioned Roles
workerProvisioningRoles.help: Only launch these roles on demand; leave empty for all roles

workerProvisioningMinPerRole.label: Warm Workers Per Role
workerProvisioningMinPerRole.help: Minimum idle workers to keep warm per role

workerProvisioningMaxPerRole.label: Max Workers Per Role
workerProvisioningMaxPerRole.help: Maximum concurrent on-demand workers per role

workerProvisioningIdleTtlMs.label: Idle TTL
workerProvisioningIdleTtlMs.help: Terminate an idle provisioned worker after this many milliseconds

workerProvisioningStartupTimeoutMs.label: Startup Timeout
workerProvisioningStartupTimeoutMs.help: Fail a launch if the worker does not register in time

workerProvisioningPassEnv.label: Pass-through Env
workerProvisioningPassEnv.help: Environment variable names copied from controller to provisioned workers

workerProvisioningExtraEnv.label: Extra Env
workerProvisioningExtraEnv.help: Static environment variables injected into provisioned workers

workerProvisioningDockerNetwork.label: Docker Network
workerProvisioningDockerNetwork.help: Optional Docker network for launched worker containers

workerProvisioningDockerMounts.label: Docker Mounts
workerProvisioningDockerMounts.help: Optional Docker bind mounts for launched worker containers

workerProvisioningWorkspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workerProvisioningWorkspaceRoot.help: Optional persistent workspace root path inside docker/kubernetes workers; defaults to /workspace-root when persistence is configured

workerProvisioningDockerWorkspaceVolume.label: Docker Workspace Volume
workerProvisioningDockerWorkspaceVolume.help: Optional Docker named volume or host path mounted as the persistent workspace root

workerProvisioningKubernetesContext.label: Kubernetes Context
workerProvisioningKubernetesContext.help: Optional kubectl context for the Kubernetes provider

workerProvisioningKubernetesServiceAccou.label: Kubernetes Service Account
workerProvisioningKubernetesServiceAccou.help: Optional service account for launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesWorkspacePer.label: Kubernetes Workspace PVC
workerProvisioningKubernetesWorkspacePer.help: Optional PVC mounted as the persistent workspace root for launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesLabels.label: Kubernetes Labels
workerProvisioningKubernetesLabels.help: Extra labels applied to launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesAnnotations.label: Kubernetes Annotations
workerProvisioningKubernetesAnnotations.help: Extra annotations applied to launched worker pods

mode.description: Plugin mode: controller manages the team, worker executes tasks

port.description: HTTP server port for this instance

role.description: Worker role (only used in worker mode)

controllerUrl.description: Manual controller URL fallback (used when mDNS discovery fails)

taskTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a role task to finish

gitRemoteUrl.description: Optional remote repository URL for distributed worker clone/pull/push

gitDefaultBranch.description: Default branch name for the shared TeamClaw workspace repository

gitAuthorName.description: Git author name used for TeamClaw-managed workspace commits

gitAuthorEmail.description: Git author email used for TeamClaw-managed workspace commits

localRoles.description: Controller-local roles executed in this same OpenClaw instance

workerProvisioningControllerUrl.description: Controller URL injected into provisioned workers; required for docker/kubernetes

workerProvisioningRoles.description: Restrict on-demand launches to specific roles; empty means all roles

workerProvisioningMinPerRole.description: Minimum number of ready workers to keep warm per role

workerProvisioningMaxPerRole.description: Maximum on-demand workers to launch per role

workerProvisioningIdleTtlMs.description: Terminate provisioned idle workers after this many milliseconds

workerProvisioningStartupTimeoutMs.description: Fail a launch if the worker does not register within this many milliseconds

workerProvisioningImage.description: Container image used by docker/kubernetes provisioners

workerProvisioningPassEnv.description: Environment variable names copied from the controller into provisioned workers

workerProvisioningExtraEnv.description: Extra environment variables injected into provisioned workers

workerProvisioningDockerNetwork.description: Optional Docker network name for launched worker containers

workerProvisioningDockerMounts.description: Optional Docker bind mounts for launched worker containers

workerProvisioningWorkspaceRoot.description: Optional persistent workspace root path inside docker/kubernetes workers; defaults to /workspace-root when a Docker volume or PVC is configured

workerProvisioningDockerWorkspaceVolume.description: Optional Docker named volume or host path mounted as the persistent workspace root

workerProvisioningKubernetesNamespace.description: Kubernetes namespace for launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesContext.description: Optional kubectl context used by the Kubernetes provisioner

workerProvisioningKubernetesServiceAccou.description: Optional service account name for launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesWorkspacePer.description: Optional PVC mounted as the persistent workspace root for launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesLabels.description: Extra labels applied to launched worker pods

workerProvisioningKubernetesAnnotations.description: Extra annotations applied to launched worker pods
